qa_pairs.question: How can a user log into a CPU login node on the Trillium cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To log into a CPU login node on the Trillium cluster, use the SSH command: `$ ssh -i /PATH/TO/SSH_PRIVATE_KEY MYALLIANCEUSERNAME@trillium.scinet.utoronto.ca`. This command requires the path to your private SSH key and your Alliance username.

qa_pairs.question: What is the SSH command for logging into the GPU cluster login node on Trillium?
qa_pairs.answer: To log into the GPU cluster's login node on Trillium, use the SSH command: `$ ssh -i /PATH/TO/SSH_PRIVATE_KEY MYALLIANCEUSERNAME@trillium-gpu.scinet.utoronto.ca`. This command requires the path to your private SSH key and your Alliance username for authentication.
